1881860.name: World of Warplanes — A6M3-30 Pack
1881860.description:
This DLC is not compatible with an account created outside Steam.

This bundle includes the Japanese Mitsubishi A6M3 (experimental) fighter. The aircraft boasts excellent airspeed and maneuverability, which makes it a real gamechanger at low altitudes. Its powerful machine gun and autocannon armament are sure to deal critical damage! In addition, you will receive a decoration set, days of Premium account, gold, and Steel Supply Crates with a chance to receive three guaranteed prizes: days of Premium Account, Premium aircraft, gold, Free XP, consumables, experimental equipment, pilots with free skill points, and materials. You will also get a thematic emblem that gives a bonus (crew experience in each battle: +2%)!

DLC Content:
  • Mitsubishi A6M3 (experimental), a Japanese Tier V fighter
  • 1 Hangar slot
  • 1 crew trained to 100%
  • 1 decoration set (paint scheme, nose art, emblem)
  • 1 emblem
  • 3 days of Premium Account
  • 1,500 gold
  • 2 Steel Supply Crates
1881860.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 法语*, 德语*, 波兰语*, 捷克语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
